content: Hi there! Welcome to Tasklet support. I'm happy to help you today.
Yeah I've been having some trouble with my account.
Of course. Can I get your account email address so I can look into that for you?
Got it. And what specifically is happening with your account?
I was charged twice for the same month. I see two identical charges on my card.
I can see the duplicate charge on your account. I'll escalate this to our billing team and you should receive a refund within 5 to 7 business days.
You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Great. Have a wonderful day and don't hesitate to reach out if anything else comes up!
